base_template.name: TRMM_Base v3.1
base_template.html:
{% block header_title %}{% endblock %}

Report Date: {{ report_run_timestamp.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }}

{% block content %}{% endblock %}
{% block footer %}
{% endblock %}

template.name: Windows Updates Not Installed_By Client v3.1
template.template_variables:
data_sources:
  allFieldsWindowsUpdates:
    filter:
      agent__site__client__id: '{{client.id}}'
    model: winupdate
    only:
    - id
    - agent__hostname
    - title
    - installed
    - description
    - severity
    - categories
    - category_ids
    - kb_article_ids
report_run_timestamp: !now
